title: anthurium gehrigeri
intro: Anthurium gehrigeri, also known as the flowering anthurium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. It is known for its heart-shaped spathe that can grow up to 6 inches in length, often used in floral arrangements. The medicinal properties of Anthurium gehrigeri include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are obtained from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of the plant include lowering blood pressure and reducing stress, and it is often prepared into herbal teas and infusions for its medicinal uses.
